Saudi Arabia's AI Boom Has a Water Problem

Active, under-construction, and planned data centers overlaid on projected future water stress (2065-2095, BAU scenario) from the WRI Aqueduct 4.0 Water Risk Atlas. Saudi Arabia ranks among the world's most water-stressed nations, yet is building one of the largest data center corridors in the Middle East.

Ali Abutaleb, PhD · George Mason University
